articles.title: Siemens announces issuance of 1st digital bond on Polygon
articles.description: Siemens, Germany’s third-largest publicly traded company by market cap, has issued its first digital bond worth €60 million ($64 million) on the Polygon blockchain.

articles.title: Breaking: Circle squashes rumors of planned SEC enforcement action
articles.description: Rumors swirled on Twitter that the stablecoin issuer received a litigation notice from the U.S. securities regulator, but a Circle executive rebuffed the claim.

articles.title: While Aptos Price Explodes, These Cryptos Might 10x in 2023
articles.description: Aptos (APT) bulls have regained control in the last few days. Since Monday’s multi-week lows in the $12.30s per token, the cryptocurrency has rallied over 16% and was last trading just under $14.40. APT/USD appears to be in the process of breaking to the north of a short-term downtrend that has now been in play going all the way back to the end of January. This could open the door to a move...

articles.title: As Crazy As It Sounds, Shiba Inu May Hit $1 Based On These Key Driving Factors
articles.description: The BoneShibaSwap Twitter account has outlined factors that can supercharge Shiba Inu (SHIB) to shatter record highs despite a massive hit to crypto prices as investors grapple with increased regulatory enforcement from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC).

articles.title: All Crypto ATM Firms in UK Are Illegal, Says FCA
articles.description: It hasn’t been up to two months since Elliptic, a blockchain analytics firm, published a report detailing its prediction for crypto regulations this year. The firm said 2023 would see increased sanctions in the crypto space as global regulators would tighten regulation in the industry. Elliptics reports have already started unfolding as regulators engage in […]

articles.title: Polygon eyes mainnet beta release for zkEVM Layer 2 next month
articles.description: Polygon has planned to launch its new Layer 2 scaling solution, zkEVM, on mainnet beta on Mar. 27.

articles.title: Polygon Sets March Date for zkEVM Mainnet Beta to Go Live
articles.description: Details about the zkEVM beta network will be released over the next few weeks. The launch is set for March 27.

articles.title: BNB Chain Aims to Double Transaction Speed, Targets ZK Tooling in 2023 Road Map
articles.description: It also aims to more than triple the number of validators to 100.
